Articles & Publications from the Molecular Sciences Institute

Note: Please contact Lalaine Pedron if you would like reprints of any of the articles below.

 

Brenner, S. "The house that Jim built." Nature. 2000. 405:511-2. external link.

Brenner, S. "Genomics. The end of the beginning." Science. 2000. 287:2173-4. pubmed link.

Brenner, S. "Theoretical biology in the third millennium." Phil. Trans. R. Soc. Lond., 1999, 354:1963-1965. pubmed link.

Brenner, S. "The Impact of Society on Science." Science. 1998. 282:1411-1412. external link.

Brenner, S. "Twisted strands." Nature. 1998. 395:762. external link.

Brent, R. "Genomic Biology." Cell. 2000. 100:169-183. pubmed link.

Brent, R. "Functional genomics: learning to think about gene expression data." Current Biology. 1999. 9:338-341. pubmed link.

Brent. R., and Carlson, R. "Double stranded DNA arrays: next steps in the surface campaign." Nature Biotechnology. 1999. 17:536-537. pubmed link.

Brent, R. and Kodadek, T. "Interaction, assembly and processing Life on an interface." Current Opinion in Chemical Biology. 2000. 4:13-15.

Elgar, G., Clark, M.S., Meek, S., Smith, S., Warner, S., Edwards, Y.J., Bouchireb, N., Cottage, A., Yeo, G.S., Umrania, Y., Williams, G., Brenner, S. "Generation and analysis of 25 Mb of genomic DNA from the pufferfish Fugu rubripes by sequence scanning." Genome Res., 1999, 9:960-71. pubmed link.

Endy, D., You, L., Yin, J., Molineux, I.J. "Computation, prediction, and experimental tests of fitness for bacteriophage T7 mutants with permuted genomes." PNAS-USA. 2000, 97:5375-5380. pubmed link.

Fabbrizio, E., Le Cam, L., Polanowska, J., Kaczorek, M., Lamb, N., Brent, R., Sardet, C. "Inhibition of mammalian cell proliferation by genetically selected peptide aptamers that functionally antagonize E2F activity." Oncogene. 1999. 18:4357-63. pubmed link.

Gellner, K., Brenner, S. "Analysis of 148 kb of genomic DNA around the wnt1 locus of Fugu rubripes." Genome Res. 1999. 9:251-8. pubmed link.

Geyer, R., Colman-Lerner, A., Brent, R. ""Mutagenesis" by peptide aptamers identifies genetic network members and pathway connections." Proc. Natl. Acad..Sci. USA. 1999. 96:8567-8572. pubmed link.

Jappelli, R., Brenner, S. "Interaction between cAMP-dependent protein kinase catalytic subunit and peptide inhibitors analyzed with lambda repressor fusions." J Mol Biol. 1996. 259(4):575-8. pubmed link.

Jappelli, R., Brenner, S. "A genetic screen to identify sequences that mediate protein oligomerization in Escherichia coli." Biochem Biophys Res Commun. 1999. 266:243-7. pubmed link.

Jappelli, R., Cesareni, G. "Cooperativity of mutational effects within a six amino acid residues substitution that induces a major conformational change in human H ferritin." Biochem. Biophys. Res. Commun. 1998. 250:342-6. pubmed link.

Jappelli, R., Brenner, S. "Changes in the periplasmic linker and in the expression level affect the activity of ToxR and lambda-ToxR fusion proteins in Escherichia coli." FEBS Lett. 1998. 423:371-5. pubmed link.

Lim, E.H., Brenner, S. "Short-range linkage relationships, genomic organisation and sequence comparisons of a cluster of five HSP70 genes in Fugu rubripes." Cell. Mol. Life Sci. 1999 55:668-78. pubmed link.

Mendelsohn, A.R., Brent, R. "Protein interaction methods: toward an endgame." Science. 1999. 284:1948-1950. pubmed link.

Mendelsohn, A.R., Brent, R. "Postgenomic protein analysis: the next bend in the river." Nature Biotechnology. 1998. 16:520-521. pubmed link.

Peixoto, B.R., Mikawa, Y., Brenner, S. "Characterization of the recombinase activating gene-1 and 2 locus in the Japanese pufferfish, Fugu rubripes." Gene. 2000. 246:275-283. pubmed link.

Ryder, O.A., McLaren, A., Brenner, S., Zhang, Y.P., Benirschke, K. "DNA banks for endangered animal species." Science. 2000. 288:275-7. pubmed link, Science online (requires account).

Tunnecliffe, G., Gloeckner, G., Elgar, G., Brenner, S., Rosenthal, A. "Comparative Analysis of the PCOLCE region in Fugu rubripes using a new automated annotation tool. Mammalian Genome." 2000, 11:213-219. pubmed link.

Venkatesh, B., Ning, Y., Brenner, S. "Late changes in spliceosomal introns define clades in vertebrate evolution." Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. USA. 1999. 96:10267-71. pubmed link.

Way, J.C. "Covalent modification as a strategy to block protein-protein interactions with small-molecule drugs." Curr Opin Chem Biol. 2000. 4:40-6. pubmed link.

Wentworth, J.M., Schoenfeld, V., Meek, S., Elgar, G., Brenner ,S., Chatterjee, V.K. "Isolation and characterisation of the retinoic acid receptor-alpha gene in the Japanese pufferfish, F. rubripes." Gene, 1999, 236:315-23. pubmed link.

Yamaguchi, F., Yamaguchi, K., Tokuda, M., Brenner, S. "Molecular cloning of EDG-3 and N-Shc genes from the puffer fish, Fugu rubripes, and conservation of synteny with the human genome." FEBS Lett. 1999. 459:105-10. pubmed link.

Brent, R. How to run a very small factory. Cell. 1986. 47:329-330.
